response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrated C++ experience on Windows in capital markets or fixed-income domains, with most roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile stacks; while there is brief C++ exposure from 2014–2015 at National Instruments, it is outdated and unrelated to financial systems, and there is no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle or domain expertise in fixed income or investment banking.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background across diverse tech stacks
Proven experience in CI/CD, testing, and dev-ops practices
Active open-source contributor with technical communication skills
concerns: No recent or relevant C++ experience on Windows for financial systems
Lacks documented SQL Server/Oracle or fixed-income capital markets domain expertise
Primary technologies (TypeScript, DLang, Node.js) do not align with core job requirements
